scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:1: dotenv -e stack1.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:2: dotenv -e stack2.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:3: dotenv -e stack3.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:4: dotenv -e stack4.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:5: dotenv -e stack5.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.test:e2e: npm -w apps/backend run build && npm -w apps/backend run test:e2e
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker-compose down && docker-compose build && docker-compose up -d
scripts.build:packages: npm -w packages/events run build && npm -w packages/errors run build
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:packages && npm -w apps/backend run build:prod && npm -w packages/client run build:prod && npm -w apps/ui2 run build:prod && npm -w apps/ui run build:prod
scripts.release:backend: npm run zero-to-prod && npm -w apps/backend run release
